answer:
**In Volume II of Charles Dunoyer's *Nouveau traité d'économie sociale*, he treats the freedom (or liberty) of agricultural industry in Chapter VII (logical chapter number 17), titled "De la liberté de l'industrie agricole" ("On the liberty of the agricultural industry").**[^1]

This entire chapter is devoted to the topic. It begins by critiquing Destutt de Tracy's treatment of agriculture as indistinguishable from manufacturing,[^2] then examines agriculture's unique nature (e.g., reliance on vital forces like life, dissemination of agents across the countryside, and production of living products), its societal role, obstacles to its progress (e.g., isolation of agents, empirical methods, moral habits), and the conditions for its liberty (e.g., personal faculties like business talent and accounting; real means like workshop situation, tools, and division of labor; and social/political respect for property). Dunoyer argues that agricultural liberty expands with the development of these powers, just as in other industries, though agriculture lags due to its inherent difficulties.[^3]

Prior chapters provide context: Chapter IV outlines general conditions for industrial liberty; Chapter V applies them to various industries; Chapter VI covers manufacturing liberty specifically.[^4]

[^1]: Charles Dunoyer, *Nouveau traité d'économie: VOL II*, [Chapter VII](/works/charles-dunoyer-nouveau-traite-deconomie-vol-ii-d6ae03/17-vii-de-la-liberte-de-lindustrie-agricole-130/translation/).

[^2]: Charles Dunoyer, *Nouveau traité d'économie: VOL II*, [§1](/works/charles-dunoyer-nouveau-traite-deconomie-vol-ii-d6ae03/17-vii-de-la-liberte-de-lindustrie-agricole-130/translation/#p-ed00c5).

[^3]: Charles Dunoyer, *Nouveau traité d'économie: VOL II*, [§8](/works/charles-dunoyer-nouveau-traite-deconomie-vol-ii-d6ae03/17-vii-de-la-liberte-de-lindustrie-agricole-130/translation/#p-d1acb0).

[^4]: Charles Dunoyer, *Nouveau traité d'économie: VOL II*, [Chapter IV](/works/charles-dunoyer-nouveau-traite-deconomie-vol-ii-d6ae03/14-iv-des-conditions-auxquelles-toute-industrie-peut-/translation/), [Chapter V](/works/charles-dunoyer-nouveau-traite-deconomie-vol-ii-d6ae03/15-v-application-de-ces-moyens-de-liberte-aux-diverse/translation/), [Chapter VI](/works/charles-dunoyer-nouveau-traite-deconomie-vol-ii-d6ae03/16-vi-de-la-liberte-de-lindustrie-manufacturiere/translation/).
